title: Mismatch pattern database
description: Search live objdiff mismatch summaries plus generated local indexes of known assembly mismatch patterns, source-shape fixes, and imported compiler-note chunks.
status_message: Live runner v1: objdiff mismatch evidence is generated locally by knowledge/tools/mismatch_db/runners/analyze_objdiff_mismatches.py.
limitations: The live runner performs a narrow representative objdiff diff; broaden --unit/--symbol targets for specific files.
Reference-note indexes remain supplemental and should be verified against local objdiff output.
